meaning: n.浮现,露出,(植物)突出体,出现
examples: What is the custom and usage in this emergence?
We saw the emergence of flight search engines such as Kayak and Skyscanner.
It is difficult to isolate the factors that led to the next development—the emergence of urban settlements.
Besides weighting, another factor that impacts long-term analysis is the emergence of new products and services.
Advertisers will see this and I can imagine the emergence of a new advertising technique.
